case_title: TARNOPOLSKY, MYRA VS WONG, RON IND. & DBA WONGCO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE, AGENTS FOR SERVICE INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS AND MERCHANTILE REASSURANCE CO. RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARNOPOLSKY, MYRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, RON IND. & DBA WONGCO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,528.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT, INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MERCANTILE REASSURANCE CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, RON IND. & DBA WONGCO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MERCANTILE REASSURANCE CO.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, RON IND. & DBA WONGCO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MERCANTILE REASSURANCE CO.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY TARNOPOLSKY, MYRA AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, RON IND. & DBA WONGCO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MERCANTILE REASSURANCE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT(FOR COURT USE ONLY): FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT ENTERED AS TO J. DEBTOR: WONG,RON I&DBA WONGCO CONSTRUCTION CO.(CASH/ORDER)
